description: A comprehensive web application for managing padel court reservations, player rankings, tournaments, and coaching sessions. Built specifically for the Port Said padel community with role-based admin access, automated player matching, and a complete point system integration.
keyFeatures: Court Booking System - Real-time availability checking, multi-location support, and booking management with conflict detection
Player Ranking & Point System - Integration with Port Said point system (164 players), fuzzy name matching, automatic player recognition with notifications
Tournament Management - Complete tournament lifecycle management, team registration, bracket generation, match tracking, and results
Role-Based Admin System - Super admin, club owners, timing organizers, tournament organizers, and coach admins with approval workflow
Coaching Sessions - Professional coach profiles, session booking, availability management, and payment integration
Notification System - In-app notifications for player matching, booking confirmations, and admin approvals
Multi-language Support - English and Arabic translations throughout the application
Responsive Design - Fully mobile-optimized with modern UI/UX

screenshots.name: Home/Landing Page
screenshots.description: Hero section with call-to-action buttons, feature highlights (easy booking, expert coaching, tournaments), and responsive navigation bar with notification bell

screenshots.name: Booking Page
screenshots.description: Interactive court booking interface with date picker, time slot selection, location/court selection, availability indicators, and booking summary with pricing

screenshots.name: Super Admin Dashboard
screenshots.description: Administrative dashboard showing app statistics (total users, bookings, locations, courts), pending admin approval requests, and links to player management

screenshots.name: Player Management
screenshots.description: Admin interface for managing player records, creating new players, viewing rankings, and handling player-point system integration

screenshots.name: Tournaments Page
screenshots.description: Tournament listing with registration options, tournament details, highlights, and management interface for tournament organizers

screenshots.name: Point System/Rankings
screenshots.description: Player rankings display with 164 players from Port Said point system, categorized by points (⚫️, 🟡, 🟣, ⚪️, 🔵), search functionality, and filtering

databaseModels: User (with roles: player, admin, super_admin, club_owner, timing_organizer, tournament_organizer, coach_admin)
Player (linked to User, with points and ranking)
apiEndpoints: /api/players/check-match - Player name matching against point system
currentStatus: Development - Database connection issues being resolved, core features implemented
